title: Moebius: 0.2B image inpainting model with 10B-level performance
summary: Moebius是一个仅0.2B参数的高效图像修复模型，却达到了10B级别模型的性能表现，看点在于其极小的参数量与顶尖效果的巨大反差。

title: Unsloth GLM-5.2 – How to Run Locally
summary: Unsloth 发布了 GLM-5.2 模型的本地运行指南，看点在于如何高效部署这一新模型。

title: Show HN: Oak – Git alternative designed for agents
text:
Oak is a version control system I've been working on designed for agents (https://oak.space). It improves the speed and context your agents need when working on serious projects. With virtual mounts, agents locally and in the cloud no longer need a full copy of a repo to get working. You can work on many tasks in parallel without needing to download everything or fight worktrees. Version control shouldn't waste you or your agents time. It should be fast, creative and fun to make things with agents.

Oak is still early in development. There's no Windows build and missing plenty of features (no CI, no issues, no comments). We still use GitHub Actions for building Oak now, but we've been fully bootstrapped on Oak with no Git backup for several months: https://oak.space/oak/oak.

Blog post: https://oak.space/blog#git-is-forever

Docs: https://oak.space/docs
summary: Oak 是一个专为 AI 代理设计的版本控制系统，通过虚拟挂载技术让代理无需下载完整仓库即可并行处理任务，提升速度和效率。

title: The text in Claude Code’s “Extended Thinking” output
summary: 该帖子指出Claude Code的“扩展思考”输出文本并非真实推理过程，而是经过修饰的伪内容，看点在于揭露AI模型输出与真实认知过程之间的差异。

title: Help I accidentally a wigglegram
summary: 一个关于意外制作出“wigglegram”（摇摆立体照片）的趣味技术分享，展示了如何通过误操作生成动态立体图像。

title: Prompt Injection as Role Confusion
summary: 该帖子探讨了提示注入攻击如何利用角色混淆机制，揭示了AI系统在身份边界模糊时的安全漏洞。

title: GLM 5.2 vs. Opus
summary: GLM 5.2与Opus的对比评测，看点在于国产大模型与国际顶尖模型在性能上的直接较量。

title: Show HN: HN Game Stories – mini-documentary of games that hit the front page
text:
Hi all,
   This is coolwulf and I have been working on a project. The idea is to generate video content on popular Hacker News gaming stories. So far I just started this idea and will continue contributing to the content.
summary: 该帖子展示了一个将Hacker News首页热门游戏故事制作成迷你纪录片的视频项目，看点在于用AI生成内容的形式回顾社区经典游戏讨论。
